misc: Waters the course more than the course sprinklers.
biography: Pekka, a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, is known for his meticulous approach to the game and his even more meticulous watering of the greens. Representing Espoo Ringside Golf, Pekka brings a unique blend of intensity and sportsmanship to the course.

With 7 past appearances and one victory in the Hector Trophée, Pekka has proven himself a formidable competitor. While the Victor Trophy has eluded him thus far, his consistent performance and dedication suggest that individual glory may yet be within his reach. Hector Trophée 2026 will be his eighth appearance in the tournament.

Off the course, Pekka is known for his quiet demeanor and his passionate advocacy for water conservation. He is often seen tending to the course, ensuring that every blade of grass receives the hydration it needs - sometimes even more than the course sprinklers provide. This attention to detail extends to his game, where he carefully analyzes every shot and leaves no stone unturned in his quest for improvement.

Pekka's continued presence in the Hector Trophée is a testament to his love of the game and his unwavering commitment to his team. Whether he's strategizing with his partner or offering encouragement to his fellow competitors, Pekka embodies the spirit of the tournament.
